sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107039" key="u(pei/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπείρ</orth>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπέρ,</foreign> used when a long syll. is needed before a vowel, e.g. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπεὶρ ἅλα</foreign> : also in compds.</entryFree>
